codeReview.summary: Pass. The fix directly closes the prior blocker: `CloudflareRealtimeTransportLayer::build_upgrade_request` now adds `X-OpenAI-Agents-SDK` alongside the existing upgrade/auth headers, crate-local coverage asserts the exact value, and the public facade regression test now checks the same contract while the rest of the transport logic remains unchanged.

summary: Reviewed the fix transcript skeleton, the original and fix diffs, the current repository state, and the shared-state guidance. The Cloudflare fetch-upgrade path now matches the JS common-header parity requirement for `X-OpenAI-Agents-SDK` without changing the surrounding transport behavior, so the prior blocker is resolved.
